name: Cereal Gumdrop Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 9x9 inch baking pan.
2. Heat marshmallows and margarine in a 3-quart saucepan over low heat until melted. Remove from heat; stir in vanilla and cinnamon.
3. Fold in cereal, 2 cups at a time; fold in almonds and gumdrops.
4. Press mixture into the prepared pan using the back of a buttered spoon.
5. Let stand at least 1 hour before cutting into bars. To make colorful for Christmas, use red and green gumdrops.
